channel.title: Cool Websites on John Alberts' Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cool Websites on John Alberts' Blog

item.title: Grooveshark -- Listen to Free Music
item.description:
Grooveshark – Listen to Free Music.

Just found this website tonight for playing music online for free.  It’s a community based service where you can have friends to share music with.  It’s kind of like Last.fm and Pandora, but with a much nicer interface.  It seems to load very quickly and the music seems like decent quality.

item.title: Wetpaint | Wiki - Create a free wiki. Many looks. No code required.
item.description:
Wetpaint | Wiki - Create a free wiki. Many looks. No code required.

This looks like a really nice site as an alternative to using MySpace. You can create web pages without using any code at all and the pages look pretty good. Best of all, it’s FREE!

I did notice one problem though. I took a look at one persons site and it let me edit their site. Hopefully there are options to disable that.
